headline: A Look At PPG Industries (PPG) Valuation After Recent Choppy Share Price Performance
summary: Valuation snapshot and recent price performance PPG Industries (PPG) shares recently closed at US$109.80, with the stock showing a small gain over the past month but a decline over the past 3 months, leaving the 1 year total return just under 10%. See our latest analysis for PPG Industries. For PPG, recent trading has been a bit choppy, with a 7 day share price return of a 4.4% decline, a 30 day share price return of 2.9%, and a 1 year total shareholder return of 9.9%. Taken together, these...
